asset_name: Reflection Lane Guide — projectile travel corridor
shared_properties: Uses the project core palette copy #D4AF37/#2B1B17/#00FFFF.
Anchors to the center duel corridor between enemy and player slots.
Supports 250 px/s to 400 px/s projectile travel readability.
differences: This file carries the semi-transparent lane guide without card or HP widgets.
Rune tick marks show the reflection corridor and impact line only.

reference_images.label: duel_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Ground the travel corridor width and central focus line.

reference_images.label: source_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Ground the reflection line timing and projectile approach path.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_5/world_reflection_lane_1600x180.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under world_reflection_lane_1600x180.
runtime_notes: Spawn this sprite at z=2 between the hall background and projectile entities.
Keep the impact marker centered at lane-local x=1340 so it aligns with the player timing zone.
Use alpha in the PNG rather than runtime color tint so lane edges remain deterministic.

context.usage: Persistent duel lane shown while any warning icon or projectile is active.

shape.silhouette: Long rune-etched horizontal lane with a cyan impact line and lime outer guide bands.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 1600x180 px with transparent pixels outside the lane artwork.
Impact line uses #00FFFF and lands at x=1340 within the local lane canvas.
Good band spans 180 px and perfect band spans 80 px with no off-by-one drift.
